name: Kernel Fusion
description: Fusing multiple ops into a single kernel to reduce memory bandwidth and launch overhead

name: Compute/Comm Reordering
description: Reordering compute and communication ops in the graph for better overlap in distributed training

name: Persistent Reduction
description: Inductor optimization where small reductions are computed without looping — entire reduction fits in shared memory

name: Outer Reduction
description: Reduction where the reduction dimension is non-contiguous — requires specific heuristics for tile sizes

name: cpp_guards
description: C++ guard manager enabled by default for faster guard evaluation (enable_cpp_guard_manager)
